footer.tagline: Rent tools, gear, and equipment from people and businesses near you — with clear daily rates and deposit protection.

home.heroSubtitle: List tools, gear, and equipment with clear daily rates. Renters pay a security deposit; owners get paid when items come back on time.
home.heroFinePrint: No storefront — just real people and verified businesses renting nearby.
home.exampleCaptionSub: Book dates, pick up, return — like a rental, not a sale.
home.depositDesc: Security deposit protects owners. On-time return unlocks your refund minus the rental fee.
home.listDesc: Set a daily rate and availability. RentLink keeps 10% when a rental completes.
home.trustDesc: ID verification helps keep rentals safer for individuals and businesses.
home.exploreSubtitle: Sample listings — daily rate and refundable deposit shown on each card.

search.introBefore: Find gear to borrow for a few days — prices are
search.placeholder: Search rentals by name or category…

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to your RentLink account
login.emailUnconfirmedBody: Your email is not confirmed yet. Open the link we sent you, or resend the confirmation email below.
login.resendCheckInbox: Check your inbox (and spam) for a new confirmation link.
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email before signing in. Check your inbox for the link from Supabase.
login.errorNetwork: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and Supabase URL.
login.errorMissingConfig: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env

register.title: Create an account
register.subtitle: Join RentLink today
register.passwordHint: Must be at least 6 characters long.
register.successBody: Please check your email to verify your account before logging in.
register.successHint: After your first login, you'll complete your profile (FAN, phone, location) before you can list items or start a rental.
register.errorWeakPassword: Password is too weak. Use at least 6 characters.
register.errorEmailInUse: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
register.errorNetwork: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and Supabase URL.
register.errorMissingConfig: Supabase is not configured. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env

completeProfile.headlineLender: Complete your profile to list items
completeProfile.subLender: Lenders need verified identity, FAN, and location before posting materials.
completeProfile.subRenter: Renters need the same details before starting a rental.
completeProfile.subDefault: We need your Fayda National ID (FAN), location, and contact details for trust and safety.
completeProfile.configBody: Set VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env, then restart npm run dev.
completeProfile.fanHint: Used for verification. Upload of ID document can be added in the next step.
completeProfile.errorSession: Your session expired. Please log in again.
completeProfile.errorMissingConfig: Supabase URL or anon key is missing. Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to .env, then restart the dev server.

listItem.title: List an item
listItem.body: Your account details and FAN are on file. Next step: add photos, title, daily rate, deposit, and availability (coming next in the MVP).

booking.notFoundBody: Open a rental from search with a valid item.
booking.paymentBody: Booking confirmed. The return countdown is live — it uses the return date and time you agreed below.
booking.remindersNote: Reminders at 24h and 1h before this time · late alerts if you exceed the deadline
booking.notifLate: Late alert if not returned on time (extra fees accrue)
booking.afterReturnBody: Reviews table: reviewer → target user, rating, comment. You'll rate the lender after the item is returned.
booking.datesHint: Pickup and return — deposit and refund follow RentLink rules.
booking.returnTimeHint: Countdown ends at this local time on the return date.
booking.policyNote: On-time return: refund = deposit − rental − platform share. Late: extra fees apply. Not returned: owner claim per policy.
booking.amountEtb: Amount to pay: {{etb}} ETB (from ${{usd}} USD total at the configured rate).
booking.phoneHint: Safaricom Ethiopia sandbox uses registered test numbers.
booking.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid Ethiopian mobile number (e.g. 09XXXXXXXX).
booking.mpesaProxyHint: Run npm run mpesa-server with server/.env configured, or use the demo link below.
booking.demoPayHint: Use this if the sandbox proxy is not running or for quick UI testing.

countdown.overdueHelp: Late fees may apply. Return the item as soon as possible.
countdown.onTimeHelp: Timer started when payment completed. Based on your agreed return date & time.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.subtitle: Monitor demo catalog stats, simulated bookings, and platform commission. Data is stored in this browser only.
admin.demoEmailHint: Access is limited to the account: {{email}}
admin.resetConfirm: Remove all demo bookings from this browser? This cannot be undone.
admin.statCommissionHint: Sum of platform fees on bookings
admin.noBookings: No bookings yet. Complete a simulated M-Pesa payment on a rental to see rows here.
admin.footerNote: Demo admin — not connected to production analytics.
